join-multiple.label: Joining Multiple Tables
join-multiple.summary: How to join more than two tables in a query.

ci-join-multiple-sql.title: Write a SQL query to list each student's name, their class name, and the teacher's name by joining the `students`, `classes`, and `teachers` tables.

intro-join-multiple.title: Why Join Multiple Tables?
intro-join-multiple.bodyMarkdown: In real-world databases, information is often spread across several tables. To answer complex questions, you may need to combine data from three or more tables in a single query. This is done by chaining multiple JOIN operations together.

syntax-join-multiple.title: Syntax for Joining Multiple Tables
syntax-join-multiple.bodyMarkdown:
To join more than two tables, you simply add more JOIN clauses to your query. Each JOIN connects another table using a matching column. For example:

```sql
SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name, p.product_name
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id;
```
This query combines data from `orders`, `customers`, and `products`.

tips-join-multiple.title: Tips for Multiple Joins
tips-join-multiple.bodyMarkdown:
- Use table aliases to keep queries readable.
- Make sure each JOIN condition matches the correct columns.
- You can mix different types of joins (INNER, LEFT, etc.) as needed.

sc-join-multiple-purpose.title: Why might you need to join more than two tables in a SQL query?
sc-join-multiple-purpose.prompt: Why might you need to join more than two tables in a SQL query?

options.a: To combine related information from several tables
options.b: To delete multiple tables at once

options.d: Mix different types of joins if needed

dr-join-multiple-order.prompt: Put the steps for joining three tables in the correct order.

tokens.t3: JOIN the second table ON a matching column
tokens.t4: JOIN the third table ON a matching column
